title: Epic of Gilgamesh, Tablet I: The Coming of Enkidu
description: The opening of the oldest epic: Gilgamesh, tyrant and hero, and the wild man Enkidu created by the gods to be his equal.
introduction: The opening of the oldest epic: Gilgamesh, tyrant and hero, and the wild man Enkidu created by the gods to be his equal.

translation.text: He who saw the Deep, the foundation of the land.
